[Next he speaks of six Mandalas or circles of Venus and
their effects.]

The four stars beginning with Bharant, (i.e. BharanI, Krttika,
Rohinl and Mrgasiras) constitute the first Mandala or circle of
Venus. This will produce good effects in the form of plenty of food.
However, it will create fear or trouble in the countries of Vahga,
Anga, Mahisa, Vahlika and KaliAga. Should another planet pass
over Venus after the latter has risen in this circle, it would kill the
rulers of the tribes viz. Bhadrasva, Surasena, Yaudheya and
Kotivarsa.

The second Mandala consists of the four stars, Ardra, Punar-
vasu, Pusya and Aslesa. It will promote good rains and luxuriant

Course of Venus IX 103
crops. It will, however, be harmful to the Brahmin class, especi-
